description: Insufficient details to evaluate the report.
A user says something happened but no raw result or exact request is supplied.
suitable_for: Opening an issue and asking for details.

description: One exact request and one exact response are available.
minimum_contents: Endpoint or symbol, timestamp, raw output or screenshot/log, tool or app used.
suitable_for: Initial review, needs-retest queue, app behavior notes.
not_suitable_for: Most confirmed change records unless low-risk documentation update.

description: The same result can be reproduced more than once under similar test conditions.
minimum_contents: At least two captures with timestamps and the same requested inputs.
suitable_for: Likely change classification and most field/schema updates.
not_suitable_for: High-impact confirmed changes without independent confirmation.

description: Another user, environment, or tool independently observes the same behavior.
minimum_contents: Two independent captures or environments, preferably including raw JSON.
suitable_for: Confirmed Yahoo API changes, endpoint availability changes, field additions/removals.

description: Observation has been promoted into a versioned project record with supporting evidence.
minimum_contents: Change ID, evidence references, status, affected endpoint/security types, release version.
